meaning: vi.{冰}在对方守区内阻截对方球员,前场阻截
examples: Reasonable utilization of forecheck technique with body may help the ice hockey players not only avoid a foul and but also effectively confront the opposite attack.
We're a dangerous team when we skate, play physical and have two guys on the forecheck.
"They're going to play tough and physical and they can grind down a team on the forecheck, " Bylsma said.
"It was a good forecheck by Kenny, " Root said.
